question: A user asks: "使用 https://github.com/microsoft/SkillOpt 最大化优化skill". Which plugin route names are required before completion? Return only the comma-separated route names.
context: [DOC] SkillOpt or skill optimization requests are complex skill-edit tasks. The dispatcher must use dynamic-workflow first, then reliable-agent-workflow for the delivery contract, and task-gate for decomposition.

question: A user asks to redesign a React UI with responsive browser verification. Which plugin route name is required? Return only the route name.
context: [DOC] Frontend, UI, redesign, styling, responsive layout, React, Vue, Svelte, browser visual verification, and visual implementation are owned by agy-frontend.

question: A user asks to slice a generated icon sheet and reject dirty cuts. Which plugin route name is required? Return only the route name.
context: [DOC] Generated icon sheets, sprite sheets, crop drift, dirty cuts, and slice-assets workflows are handled by asset-slicer.

question: A user says Codex is stuck and needs divergent brainstorming before editing. Which plugin route name is required? Return only the route name.
context: [DOC] Stuck, unsure, looping, no idea, brainstorm, and divergent thinking requests are routed to thinking-gate.
